headlines.title_cn: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
headlines.title_en: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
headlines.summary_cn: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

items.title_en: SpaceX falls to $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch
items.summary_cn: The stock has steadily fallen from the euphoric post-IPO high, showing that markets may be sobering up to the promises CEO Elon Musk made before and after SpaceX went public.

items.title_en: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
items.summary_cn: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.

items.title_cn: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
items.title_en: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
items.summary_cn: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and discovery features as it expands into new product categories.
items.summary_en: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and discovery features as it expands into new product categories.
